name: Cherrapunjee Holiday Resort
description: Perched on the edge of a cliff with panoramic views of the Bangladesh plains. Basic but charming rooms with the best sunrise in Sohra.

name: Goshen Homestay
description: A peaceful homestay surrounded by pine trees and vegetable gardens. Run by a local Khasi family who serve authentic home-cooked meals.

name: Iba Homestay Sohra
description: A traditional Khasi home with bamboo interiors and local architecture. Experience authentic village life minutes from the main waterfalls.

name: Green Hills Resort
description: Clean, affordable rooms with essential amenities. Great base camp for exploring the Sohra circuit without breaking the bank.

name: Umngot River Cottage
description: Cottages right on the banks of the Umngot River. Fall asleep to the sound of crystal-clear water flowing. Unmatched serenity.

name: By The River Homestay
description: A serene property with direct access to the Umngot for swimming and kayaking. Simple bamboo cottages with modern touches.

name: Gawooh Adventure Camp
description: Adventure camping at Shnongpdeng with tent accommodations and water activities. Best for backpackers who want the Dawki experience on a budget.

name: IAI Kyrsoi Homestay
description: A warm Khasi family homestay near Riwai village. Stay with locals, eat traditional food, and walk to the living root bridge.

name: Krangshuri Home Stay
description: Located near Krang Suri Falls with stunning views of the turquoise pool area. Simple, clean rooms run by a local Jaintia family.

name: LKS Homestay
description: A budget-friendly homestay in Jowai town. Clean rooms, reliable WiFi, and a great base for exploring the Jaintia Hills circuit.

name: Mandy Homestay
description: A modern homestay with contemporary amenities in a quiet Jowai neighborhood. Comfortable beds, clean bathrooms, and warm hospitality.

name: HeiJo's Homestay
description: A peaceful retreat surrounded by Jaintia Hills greenery. Known for excellent local food and guided trips to nearby waterfalls and monoliths.

name: Shillong Heritage Homestay
description: A beautifully maintained heritage property in central Shillong. Colonial architecture meets modern comfort. Walking distance to Police Bazar.

name: Pinewood Homestay
description: Simple, clean rooms in a quiet Shillong neighborhood. Close to Ward's Lake and Don Bosco Museum. Great value for city exploration.

name: Mountain View Retreat
description: Perched on the slopes near Shillong Peak offering panoramic city and mountain views. Peaceful escape minutes from the city center.
